final:
module RefModule (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire enable,  
    input wire [15:0] analog_in,  
    output reg [15:0] digital_out  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (enable) begin  
            digital_out <= analog_in;  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
